caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The person on the left, a man with curly hair and a beard, is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, indicating he is explaining or emphasizing a point. The woman in the middle, wearing a black t-shirt, listens attentively with her hands clasped together. The man on the right, dressed in a suit, also appears to be listening intently, occasionally shifting his posture slightly. The background includes purple lighting effects and a large screen, suggesting a formal event or presentation setting. A computer motherboard is prominently displayed on a stand in front of them, hinting that the discussion might be related to technology or computing.
